claims.falsification: schemas/theorem-blob-statement-replay-pass-0038.json is missing, has a different schema, status, theorem_count, blob_check_count, unique_blob_file_count, SHA-256, or seal
claims.text: Pass 0038 created a TheoremBlobStatementReplaySet/v1 artifact with status BLOB_STATEMENT_REPLAY_MATCH, theorem_count 10, blob_check_count 10, unique_blob_file_count 10, sha256 9ee5d5c8330911c04cc5de9a8a5856d18a46373a8a641e6f3fe3c2cffa4c2915, and seal 53541e1bdcb049e8823dff70b6f20b873a5dabea3ce63a854bdcdd53133e43bd.

claims.falsification: the blob statement replay fixture is missing, has a different SHA-256 or seal, or is not linked from the schema
claims.text: Pass 0038 records fixture fixtures/theorem-blob-statement-replay-pass-0038.json with sha256 9d6bef985d4440d10110b7398bee1fbb74059b9ac6f55512910e36932edbaf26 and seal ca0214a4d5693a02d5fac1d441058ea3c773f30307abcfec3514004f71c12848.

claims.falsification: the pass 0037 or pass 0036 binding is missing, has a different SHA-256 or seal, or does not report the expected source status
claims.text: Pass 0038 binds to pass 0037 statement equivalence and pass 0036 source-ref integrity with the recorded SHA-256 and seals, and source statuses STATEMENT_EQUIVALENCE_MATCH and SOURCE_REF_INTEGRITY_MATCH.

claims.falsification: any of the ten blob statement checks has blob_frozen_solution_status, blob_frozen_proof_status, blob_discharge_status, or blob_signature_status other than MATCH
claims.text: Pass 0038 records all ten theorem blob statement checks with frozen-solution, frozen-proof, discharge-gate, and overall blob signature statuses MATCH.

claims.falsification: any unique blob file has Git blob SHA-256 or blob id differing from the pass 0036 source-ref packet
claims.text: Pass 0038 records all ten unique blob files with Git blob SHA-256 and blob id matching pass 0036 source-ref integrity rows.

claims.falsification: the pass 0038 validator result is missing, reports DRIFT, or has different theorem_count, blob_check_count, or unique_blob_file_count
claims.text: Pass 0038 validator result reports MATCH with theorem_count 10, blob_check_count 10, and unique_blob_file_count 10.

claims.falsification: packet 048 or the pass 0038 steelman is missing or has a different SHA-256
claims.text: Pass 0038 records packet 048 with sha256 751c40c4ad423e60ee375452cccbf3624ef6fd7e3c5ddf8ffd12356babef50ad and local steelman with sha256 09b2d1e186fbfcbfdfcfe64473a915b66eaf409f36786940a87ae06b7fc2b52c.

claims.falsification: pass 0038 artifacts claim Lean replay, semantic proof review, axiom-free proof, validation of every public pipeline-math claim, or a promoted natural law
claims.text: Pass 0038 preserves non-promotion boundaries: it checks source-signature replay from Git blob bytes only, does not re-run Lean, does not claim semantic proof review, and current_promoted_natural_laws remains none.

title: Dogfood Pass 0038 Git Blob Statement Replay
